mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM t_deposit WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND wallet_tx_id IS NOT NULL
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM t_position WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 1
SELECT id FROM t_position WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY opened_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE t_position SET opened_at = #{openedAt}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{positionId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM t_outbox
SELECT CAST(mark_price AS CHAR) FROM t_liquidation_log WHERE position_id = #{positionId} ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT CAST(platform_covered_loss AS CHAR) FROM t_liquidation_log WHERE position_id = #{positionId} ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT CAST(margin_released AS CHAR) FROM t_liquidation_log WHERE position_id = #{positionId} ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT action_status FROM t_hedge_log WHERE symbol = #{symbol} ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT trigger_source FROM t_hedge_log WHERE symbol = #{symbol} ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT CAST(net_exposure_usd AS CHAR) FROM t_hedge_log WHERE symbol = #{symbol} ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT CAST(hedge_threshold_usd AS CHAR) FROM t_hedge_log WHERE symbol = #{symbol} ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT CAST(mark_price AS CHAR) FROM t_hedge_log WHERE symbol = #{symbol} ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE t_risk_exposure SET total_long_qty = #{totalLongQty}, total_short_qty = #{totalShortQty}, net_exposure = #{totalLongQty} - #{totalShortQty}, net_exposure_usd = 0, updated_at = NOW() WHERE symbol = #{symbol}
UPDATE t_risk_config SET hedge_threshold_usd = #{hedgeThresholdUsd}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE symbol = #{symbol}
